title: AI Observability & Tracing
description: Implement AI observability and tracing using tools like LangSmith or Arize Phoenix. Trace agentic workflows to identify bottlenecks and debug non-deterministic failure modes in production.
objectives: Implement AI observability and tracing using tools like LangSmith or Arize Phoenix.
Trace agentic workflows to identify bottlenecks and debug non-deterministic failure modes in production.
